apexClasses.soql: SELECT Id, Name, Body, LengthWithoutComments, NamespacePrefix FROM ApexClass WHERE NamespacePrefix = null
apexClasses.description: All custom Apex classes — used by HardcodedCredentialsCheck (populates apexBodies cache) and ApexSharingCheck

activeFlows.soql: SELECT Id, MasterLabel, ProcessType, Status, RunInMode FROM Flow WHERE Status = 'Active'
activeFlows.description: Active Flow versions — used by FlowSecurityCheck

connectedAppsBasic.description: Connected App ID list — used by IpRestrictionsCheck to fetch per-record Metadata blobs

connectedAppDetail.description: Per-record Connected App metadata — call via ctx.tooling.getRecord('ConnectedApplication', id).

connectedAppsStandard.soql: SELECT Id, Name, Status, StartUrl FROM ConnectedApplication
connectedAppsStandard.description: Connected Apps basic info — used by ConnectedAppsCheck via standard SOQL
